homeHero.title: Anthracite and T Grade from the Producer
homeHero.subtitle: From 1 ton to full vessel lots with quality guarantee

cards.title: Anthracite with ash up to 7%
cards.subtitle: Stable quality directly from the mine.
cards.description: We control metrics for every batch so you get exactly the coal you ordered.

cards.title: Quality guarantee
cards.subtitle: Documented quality confirmation for each shipment.
cards.description: Quality passport and control at every stage from the mine to loading.

cards.title: Delivery and geography
cards.subtitle: Delivery across Russia, CIS, Turkey and Europe.
cards.description: Truck, rail and charter through our own terminal in Rostov port. We select the optimal route by volume and timing, from single truck loads to vessel lots.

cards.title: Volume and stability
cards.subtitle: Over 150,000 tons per month with stable supply.
cards.description: Own production allows us to keep pricing, lead times and volumes stable.

homeDifferences.title: What sets us apart
homeDifferences.leadRest: is the exclusive representative of the "Progress" and "Komsomolets Donbassa" mines.
homeDifferences.body: A direct contract with the producer eliminates intermediaries, reduces costs, and ensures quality control at the extraction stage. This allows us to keep competitive pricing and deliver a stable product with verified characteristics.

homeDeck.badge: Stable volumes and structured logistics for long-term partnership

cards.title: Supply geography
cards.description: We deliver coal across Russia, CIS countries, Turkey and Europe, ensuring stable supply of more than 150,000 tons per month.

cards.title: Long-term partnership
cards.description: Our approach is focused on long-term cooperation: clients work with us for more than two years.

cards.title: Flexible logistics
cards.description: We provide flexible delivery terms - from warehouse to port, handle chartering, and select optimal logistics solutions for every volume.

homeSegments.badge: Solutions for key markets and delivery formats
homeSegments.title: Supply Segments

tabs.title: Anthracite for stable industrial operations
tabs.description: Supply for plants, CHP facilities, and boiler houses where predictable fuel parameters and uninterrupted volumes are critical. Ash content up to 7%, control of every batch, and direct contracts with mines ensure stable calorific value, lower operational risks, and accurate cost planning.

tabs.title: Anthracite for Caucasus wholesalers and regional markets
tabs.description: A format for companies serving retail demand in Dagestan, Vladikavkaz, and other regions. Flexible shipment batches, convenient logistics, and stable quality help maintain competitive pricing, accelerate inventory turnover, and preserve margins at moderate purchase volumes.

tabs.title: Anthracite for the Turkish market
tabs.description: Export deliveries with clear specifications and documented performance indicators. Freight arrangement, shipment control, and stable monthly volumes ensure contract reliability and transparent operations in international trade.

homeProducts.badge: Wide coal range for different tasks

homeFaq.title: Frequently asked questions

items.question: 1. Which countries do you supply coal from DPR in wholesale?
items.answer: We provide wholesale coal deliveries to Turkey, Armenia, and across the Russian Federation. Logistics are tailored to the specifics of each route.

items.question: 2. What coal types are available for wholesale purchases?
items.answer: We supply anthracite, hard coal, and coking coal. Different fractions are available, and the grade is selected according to client requirements and application area.

items.question: 3. What delivery volumes are possible?
items.answer: Deliveries are made in wholesale lots starting from several hundred tons. Maximum volumes are agreed individually depending on coal type and destination.

items.question: 4. How is delivery to Turkey and Armenia organized?
items.answer: Delivery is arranged by rail and road transport with further transshipment through ports or overland routes. We select the optimal logistics scheme for each specific order.

items.question: 5. What documents are provided with coal deliveries?
items.answer: Each shipment includes origin documents, quality certificates, and accompanying transport documentation required for customs clearance and cargo acceptance.
